svg.title: Cassette 415 V AC alternate input path
svg.desc: Alternate 415 V AC three-phase input at ELEC ECP via five Cam-Lok E1016 connectors (L1, L2, L3, N, G). Path is architecturally incomplete per ELEC-001 E-01: AC main disconnect, AC busway or home-run cable, and per-rack AC breakers are not yet in BOM. Per-rack AC conductor corrected from 35 mm² to 95 mm² per ELEC-001 §17.
svg.text: Cassette 415 V AC alternate input — single-line
Mutually exclusive with 800 V DC primary. Selected at commissioning. Path is architecturally incomplete — see E-01.
E-stop + OCP coordinated with platform upstream
NOT IN CURRENT BOM — ELEC-001 open item E-01
GAP · AC busway or home-run cables
NOT IN CURRENT BOM — ELEC-001 open item E-01
GAP · Per-rack AC branch breakers (ACB-01 through ACB-15)
250 A frame / 219 A trip per rack — NOT IN CURRENT BOM (E-01)

g.text: Per-rack cable: 3× 95 mm² L + 50 mm² N + 25 mm² G
Operating 175 A/ph · NEC 125% = 219 A · 95 mm² ampacity 285 A ✓
Corrected from BOM Rev 1.0 "4× 35 mm²" which was undersized (130 A/ph)
AC path is a capability placeholder, not a completed design
ELEC-001 §3 flags three missing items: main disconnect, busway/feeder, per-rack breakers
Cam-Lok ECP connectors are present on every cassette — unused set is capped with weather cover
Delta 110 kW shelf accepts both 800 V DC and 415 V AC — selection is at commissioning (C-02)
Recommended: defer AC buildout unless a near-term deployment genuinely needs it
Document as "ECP connectors present; pod-side gear added at time of first AC deployment"
Resolves E-01 without forcing engineering work on an unused path
